description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, accented by signs of wear and weathering. The body is constructed from metal, with a large, boxy receiver and a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The stock is skeletonized and padded, providing ergonomic support and reduced weight, while the pistol grip and trigger assembly are clearly defined. The barrel is long and straight, with a heavy profile, and the magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger. The rifle also includes several rails and attachment points for accessories, and the overall finish is matte with some glossy highlights on metallic parts. The design suggests a modern, tactical sniper or marksman rifle suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, yellow and black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, heavy barrel, large scope, and detachable box magazine, showing signs of wear and matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, scope lens, and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the rifle, scope, skeletonized stock, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the padded stock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the receiver, scope, and magazine from the other side.
